STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RONALD SIRES FILED BY KARAPETYAN, ARTAK

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ADVISED THE CLERK THAT HE RECEIVED A LETTER FROM THE COURT STATING THAT THE COURT WOULD SERVE DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
